chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1456 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 27.03.2025 Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Arshad Mehmood, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Hamayoun Shaih, Advocate for Respondents No.4 to 8 Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Written statement has been filed by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Pano Akil dated 05.11.2024, wherein he has stated that the demarcation will be conducted as soon as both the parties provide Otara of their lands. Counsel for the petitioners undertakes to provide the same. Under these circumstances, the instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of with direction to the Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Pano Akil to carry-out the demarcation of the land within 60 (sixty) days of this order after providing opportunity to the concerned parties. Judge Judge ARBROHI
